_comment: OrgPulse sample data — Acme Corp fictional org. Used as window.SAMPLE_DATA fallback in the template. Never send this to a real client.

scanMetrics.inactiveUserCountSource: UserLogin COUNT where logins = 0 in last 90 days
scanMetrics.monthlyTransactionVolumeSource: Case COUNT GROUP BY CALENDAR_MONTH(CreatedDate) last 90 days ÷ 3

verdictSub: Agentforce deployable in narrow use case only
headlineFinding: Acme Corp has a solid Salesforce investment — Sales Cloud and Service Cloud are well configured at the process level. The scan found $51,540 in verified annual waste (23 inactive users × $165/user/month × 12, plus 4 abandoned AppExchange packages) and 2 hard blockers that must be resolved before any Agentforce deployment. Every blocker on this list is fixable. Complete the roadmap in Section 5 and your index moves from 47 to 82+ in 12–16 weeks. Start remediation in June 2026 and a monitored Service agent pilot can be live by September 2026.

costOfInaction.licenseUnitCostSource: Salesforce list price — Sales Cloud Professional Edition, June 2026
costOfInaction.packageWasteNote: 4 abandoned AppExchange packages — verified from InstalledPackage metadata

roadmap.text: Deactivate 23 inactive users — recovers $45,540/yr in licence spend immediately
Remove 4 abandoned AppExchange packages — Conga legacy, MapAnything, survey tool, CTI adapter
Enable duplicate rules on Contact and Account — prevents new duplicates entering
roadmap.effort: 1 day · Prerequisite for data quality fix

roadmap.text: Add fault paths to 14 active flows — prevents silent agent failures immediately
Email enrichment + required field validation on Contact — lifts Data Quality score from 38 → 68+
Consolidate 3 conflicting Account flows into 1 governed flow — after fault paths added in Week 1
Merge 4,200 duplicate Contact records — reduces duplicate rate from 11% → 3%
Build Knowledge base — 40 articles covering top 20 case reasons (Billing first)
Design agent user permission set — least-privilege, scoped to Service use case only
Configure Agentforce Topics and Actions — case deflection for Billing, Technical, Account categories
Retire 340 unused custom fields via governance process — lifts Metadata score 61 → 78+
Monitored pilot — deploy Service agent to 10% of inbound Billing case volume
